TextView.android:text: When disabled, all blind-spot sub-features are inactive
Includes experimental options like main floating window and reuse options
Apply translation/scale correction to blind-spot floating view (Matrix)
Lock main floating window aspect ratio
When enabled, floating window scales proportionally only
Require 1s long-press to drag/scale floating window to avoid accidental touch

Button.android:text: Reset main floating window (restore default position and size)

TextView.android:text: Auto pop corresponding side camera when turn signal is on
When disabled, no show animation; still waits for frame ready

RadioButton.android:text: E. Arrow ripple (arrows fly from center)

TextView.android:text: Tap Left/Right button on desktop to trigger blind spot (3s)
Show blind-spot floating view on secondary display when activated
Auto pop corresponding side camera when door opens (reuses turn-signal linkage config)
Auto-hide main-screen blind-spot window when EVCam or specified Activity is foreground
Galaxy L6/L7 and Boyue L API adapted by Douyin @Abu IT Teacher
